filament.price_per_spool_hint: Cost per spool — applied to every reel when quantity > 1
filament.add_another_hint: Register another reel of this same filament — pre-fills profile, colour, weight and price
filament.price_not_found: Could not extract price from URL
filament.exclude_labor_cancelled: Exclude labor & markup for failed/cancelled prints
filament.exclude_labor_cancelled_hint: When enabled, only material cost is counted for failed or cancelled prints
filament.mat_tips_pla: Easy to print. Great for beginners. Avoid high temperatures post-printing.
filament.mat_warn_pla: Not suitable for outdoor use due to UV degradation. Low heat resistance (~55°C HDT).
filament.mat_tips_pla-cf: Higher stiffness than standard PLA. Matte surface finish. Reduces stringing.
filament.mat_warn_pla-cf: Requires hardened steel nozzle — carbon fiber will destroy brass nozzles quickly.
filament.mat_tips_petg: Good all-rounder. Better temperature and chemical resistance than PLA.
filament.mat_warn_petg: Can stick too well to smooth PEI — use glue stick as release agent.
filament.mat_tips_abs: Classic engineering material. Good mechanical properties. Can be vapor smoothed with acetone.
filament.mat_warn_abs: Emits strong fumes — requires enclosed printer with ventilation. Warps without enclosure.
filament.mat_tips_tpu: Print slowly for best results. Reduce retraction to avoid jams. Direct drive preferred.
filament.mat_warn_tpu: Very slow print speeds required. Bowden tube systems struggle with flexible filament.
filament.mat_tips_pa: Excellent mechanical properties. Very tough and wear-resistant. Must be bone dry.
filament.mat_warn_pa: Extremely hygroscopic — absorbs moisture rapidly. Always print from dry box.
filament.mat_tips_pc: Extremely strong and heat-resistant. Transparent variants available.
filament.mat_warn_pc: Very high temperatures. Significant warping without enclosure. X1C/X1E recommended.
filament.mat_tips_pva: Water-soluble support material. Dissolves in warm water in 4-24 hours.
filament.mat_warn_pva: Extremely hygroscopic — store sealed with desiccant. Short shelf life once opened.
filament.mat_tips_petg-cf: Very rigid and strong. Good for structural parts. Less warping than standard PETG.
filament.mat_warn_petg-cf: Requires hardened nozzle. More brittle than regular PETG.
filament.mat_tips_asa: UV-resistant alternative to ABS. Excellent for outdoor parts. Similar settings to ABS.
filament.mat_warn_asa: Emits fumes — requires enclosed printer. Warps without brim on large parts.
filament.mat_tips_pa-cf: Very strong and rigid. Excellent for functional parts. Matte surface finish.
filament.mat_warn_pa-cf: Requires hardened nozzle and enclosed printer. Extremely moisture-sensitive.
filament.mat_tips_pa-gf: Glass fiber for maximum rigidity. Better heat resistance than PA-CF. Good for jigs.
filament.mat_warn_pa-gf: Requires hardened nozzle and enclosed printer. Extremely moisture-sensitive.
filament.mat_tips_pvb: Can be smoothed with isopropyl alcohol for glass-like finish. Partially transparent.
filament.mat_warn_pvb: Less common material. IPA vapor during smoothing requires ventilation.
filament.mat_tips_hips: Soluble support for ABS (dissolves in limonene). Can also be used as standalone material.
filament.mat_warn_hips: Requires enclosed printer. Dissolution in limonene is slow (12-24 hours).
filament.mat_tips_pet-cf: Very rigid and dimensionally stable. Good for engineering parts without enclosure.
filament.mat_warn_pet-cf: Requires hardened nozzle. Carbon fiber makes the material brittle.
filament.plate_compat_desc: shows which build plate provides the best adhesion for each filament material.
filament.plate_wrong_warning: Wrong plate can cause parts to detach during printing, or PETG to permanently bond to the plate.
filament.plate_glue_desc: column shows if you need glue stick to avoid problems.

settings.ecom_desc: Receive orders from Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom platforms via webhooks.
settings.ecom_license_required: This module requires an active license from GeekTech.no
settings.timelapse_desc: Automatically record timelapse videos during prints using FFmpeg.
settings.milestone_desc: Automatically take camera photos at 25%, 50%, 75% and 100% print progress.
settings.report_desc: Automatically generate and send print reports on a weekly or monthly basis.
settings.report_email_hint: Requires email notifications to be configured
settings.public_status_desc: Share a read-only status page showing printer names, status and print progress. No authentication required for visitors.
settings.ha_mqtt_desc: Automatically register printers as devices in Home Assistant via MQTT discovery. Publishes sensors for temperature, progress, status and more.
settings.nodes_desc: Connect to other 3DPrintForge instances to view their printers alongside your local ones. External printers appear in the printer selector with real-time status.
settings.push_desc: Receive browser push notifications for print events (requires HTTPS).

settings.push_sw_required: Service Worker not available. Try reloading the page or use HTTPS.
settings.push_no_vapid: VAPID key not configured on the server.
settings.hub_desc: Enable hub mode for multi-printer overview or kiosk mode for public displays.
settings.ai_detection_desc: Camera-based print failure detection using frame analysis.
settings.printer_groups_desc: Organize printers into groups for staggered starts and power management.
settings.custom_fields_desc: Define custom fields for spools, printers, profiles, and projects.
settings.brand_defaults_desc: Set default temperature and settings per filament brand and material.
settings.courses_desc: Interactive guides and tutorials for getting started.
settings.community_db_desc: Browse 3600+ filament profiles from the community database.
settings.projects_desc: Track print jobs organized by project with cost summaries.
settings.export_desc: Export your data as CSV or JSON.
settings.color_search_desc: Find filaments by color across your inventory and the community database.
settings.price_tracking_desc: Track filament price changes over time.
settings.build_plates_desc: Track build plate usage and surface condition per printer.
settings.dryer_models_desc: Reference database of filament dryer specifications.
settings.storage_desc: Track humidity and storage conditions for each spool.
settings.quotas_desc: Set print and filament quotas per user.
settings.stagger_desc: Start prints across a group with time delays to manage power.
settings.spoolman_server_desc: Act as a Spoolman server so Klipper front-ends (Mainsail, Fluidd, KlipperScreen) can read this inventory and report filament usage — no separate Spoolman instance needed.

settings.obs_description: Use this URL as a Browser Source in OBS to show camera + print info.

maintenance.kb_ams_desc: PTFE tubes, filament path and humidity prevention.
maintenance.kb_plate_desc: IPA between prints, deep cleaning monthly. Flex to remove, never use metal scraper.
maintenance.kb_drying_desc: Wet filament causes popping, stringing and weak parts.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.keep_going: Keep going! You are almost there.
achievements.desc_landmark_viking: Use enough filament to 3D print a Viking longship at 1:1 scale (3,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_liberty: Use enough filament to 3D print the Statue of Liberty at 1:1 scale (46,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_eiffel: Use enough filament to 3D print the Eiffel Tower at 1:1 scale (180,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_bigben: Use enough filament to 3D print Big Ben at 1:1 scale (120,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_brandenburg: Use enough filament to 3D print the Brandenburg Gate at 1:1 scale (800 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_sagrada: Use enough filament to 3D print the Sagrada Família facade at 1:1 scale (8,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_colosseum: Use enough filament to 3D print the Colosseum outer wall at 1:1 scale (15,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_tokyo: Use enough filament to 3D print Tokyo Tower at 1:1 scale (90,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_gyeongbok: Use enough filament to 3D print the Gyeongbokgung throne hall at 1:1 scale (400 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_windmill: Use enough filament to 3D print a classic Dutch windmill at 1:1 scale (600 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_wawel: Use enough filament to 3D print the Wawel Dragon statue at 1:1 scale (200 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_cristo: Use enough filament to 3D print Cristo Redentor at 1:1 scale (1,200 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_torso: Use enough filament to 3D print the Turning Torso facade at 1:1 scale (2,500 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_hagia: Use enough filament to 3D print the Hagia Sophia dome at 1:1 scale (5,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_motherland: Use enough filament to 3D print the Motherland Monument at 1:1 scale (1,500 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_greatwall: Use enough filament to 3D print 1 km of the Great Wall at 1:1 scale (50,000 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_orloj: Use enough filament to 3D print the Prague Astronomical Clock at 1:1 scale (150 kg)
achievements.desc_landmark_parliament: Use enough filament to 3D print the Budapest Parliament dome at 1:1 scale (6,000 kg)

tour.nav_text: Use the sidebar to navigate between Dashboard, Controls, Filament, History and more. Sections can be collapsed.
tour.stats_text: Real-time graphs showing nozzle, bed and chamber temperatures, fan speed, print speed and layer progress.
tour.dashboard_text: Your main overview with print progress, camera feed, AMS status, temperature gauges and quick controls.
tour.printer_selector_text: If you have multiple printers, switch between them here. Each printer has its own status and data.
tour.theme_text: Toggle between light and dark theme. Press T for quick toggle, or ? to see all keyboard shortcuts.

crm.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?

insights.low_stock_message: {count} spool(s) will run out within 14 days at current usage rate.
insights.restock_message: {count} filament(s) should be reordered based on usage patterns.
insights.top_material_message: {material} is your most used material ({total_g}g in 90 days, avg {avg_daily_g}g/day).
insights.cost_message: Average cost: {avg_cost_per_kg}/kg across {total_spools} active spools. Total inventory value: {total_value}.
insights.dormant_message: {count} spool(s) haven't been used in 90+ days but still have significant filament remaining.

viewer.drag_3mf_hint: Drag a .3mf file here to save it to this print

filament_analytics.consumption_data_hint: Data is collected automatically after each print.
filament_analytics.waste_data_hint: Waste data is collected automatically from print history.
filament_analytics.efficiency_data_hint: Data is calculated from your print history.
filament_analytics.cost_data_hint: Add purchase cost on spools in filament inventory.
filament_analytics.consumption_rates_hint: Click "Recalculate" to generate consumption rates from print history.
filament_analytics.substitution_rules_hint: The system has predefined material substitutions.
filament_analytics.no_storage_alerts: No storage alerts or expired spools. Set expiry dates on spools to track shelf life.
filament_analytics.expiry_suggested: Expiry set to {{months}} months after purchase
filament_analytics.enter_code: Enter spool ID or short code
filament_analytics.scan_or_type: Scan or type a code, then Enter

network.extra_subnets_hint: Add subnets to scan in addition to automatically detected ones.
network.scan_hint: Perform a full network scan (Bambu SSDP + Moonraker) to find printers.

forge.title: Model Forge
forge.subtitle: Generate 3D printable models — no CAD skills needed
forge.sign_maker_desc: QR codes, labels, warning signs with frame and stand
forge.lithophane_desc: Convert images to 3D printable light panels
forge.text_plate_desc: Custom 3D text on a plate with multi-line support
forge.keychain_desc: Custom keychains with text and shapes
forge.cable_label_desc: Wrap-around labels for cables and wires
forge.relief_desc: Convert images to raised 3D surfaces or stamps
forge.upload_image: Drop image here or click to upload
forge.lattice_desc: Lightweight lattice structures with configurable cell types
forge.multi_color_desc: Multi-material parts for AMS color assignment
forge.thread_desc: Metric bolts, nuts, standoffs and snap-fit joints
forge.texture_desc: Procedural texture patterns on flat or curved surfaces
forge.validator_desc: Validate files, check mesh integrity, detect extensions
forge.validator_drop: Drop a .3mf file here or click to browse

snapmaker.idex_desc: Duplicate prints 2 identical copies. Mirror creates a mirrored pair.

octoprint.api_key_hint: OctoPrint API key from Settings → API → Global API Key
octoprint.approval_pending: Waiting for approval on printer touchscreen...

cost.energy_info: Energy cost based on spot prices

colororder.title: Lowest-purge colour order
colororder.hint: Pick the filament colours for a multi-colour print to get the load order that minimises purge waste.

admin_inv.no_price_data: No price data yet — click Track prices after a sync.

admin_diag.canbus_desc: Detect unassigned Klipper + Katapult nodes on a CAN interface.
admin_diag.history_desc: Delete a single job by UID. Lifetime totals are reset from the Quick actions bar.
admin_diag.notifier_desc: Sends a synthetic notification through a notifier defined in
admin_diag.tigertag_desc: Resolve a filament NFC tag UID against the offline DB + online TigerTag lookup.
admin_diag.no_tag_match: No match in offline DB or online lookup.
